heading: Performance accountability system
label: 3292 Performance accountability system
text: Programs and activities authorized in this subchapter are subject to the performance accountability provisions described in .section 3141 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title
